additional_metadata.note: First Austin dbt Meetup, hosted online.

events.agenda: Inaugural Austin dbt Meetup centered on data quality as a cross-team responsibility, including a talk on proactive data observability and a panel on cross-team collaboration.
events.event_description: dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data, discussing shared challenges in data quality across teams.
events.raw_text:
Thu, Nov 18, 2021 · 6:00 PM to 7:00 PM CST

Online event

Austin dbt Meetup (Online)

Data Quality is A Team Sport! This meetup aims to start a conversation between teams that might not get a chance to talk to one another often and suggests ideas on how to better understand stages in the data processes that impact or are impacted by our work.

Agenda:
6:00 Welcome Remarks & Announcements
6:10 Coalesce Teaser w/ Icebreaker
6:15 Proactive Data Observability by Harper
6:35 Panel: Cross-team Collaboration in Data Quality w/ Carolyn + Harper
6:55 Closing Remarks & Feedback Session
7:00 Optional informal chat

talks.description: A talk on proactive approaches to data observability to catch data quality issues before they cause downstream problems.
talks.title: Proactive Data Observability

talks.description: Panel discussion on how teams that don't often interact can better collaborate on data quality issues.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: 6:35 - Panel: Cross-team Collaboration in Data Quality w/ Carolyn + Harper
talks.title: Cross-team Collaboration in Data Quality

additional_metadata.note: Social meetup with discussion-table format, no formal talks.

events.agenda: Casual in-person social gathering with guided table discussions on analytics career growth, team structure, and tool selection.
events.event_description: A happy hour bringing together Texas-based dbt community members for socializing and discussion, no talks or formal content.
events.location: Easy Tiger, 1501 E 7th St, Austin, TX
events.raw_text:
Thu, Jul 28, 2022 · 6:30 PM to 8:30 PM CDT

Easy Tiger, 1501 E 7th St, Austin, TX

Austin dbt Meetup (in-person)

Expect a happy hour, some bites, refreshments, and vibes. No talks, no content.

Five discussion table topics voted on in #local-texas dbt Slack:
Growth paths/career development for analytics professionals
Centralization vs. decentralization of data teams/analytics strategy
How to know when it's time to learn a new tool or skill?
What is the correct order of operations in acquiring tools/workflows for a modern analytics stack?
What are non-negotiables when it comes to your tools, team, role, projects?

additional_metadata.note: Cross-posted announcement for the global Coalesce 2022 conference, not an Austin-specific meetup.

events.agenda: Announcement and registration details for Coalesce 2022, dbt Labs' annual analytics engineering conference (online, in-person in New Orleans, and satellite events in London/Sydney).
events.event_description: Coalesce is dbt Labs' annual conference dedicated to advancing the practice of analytics engineering, offered in online, in-person, and hybrid formats.
events.raw_text:
Mon, Oct 17, 2022 to Fri, Oct 21, 2022

Online event

Coalesce: The Analytics Engineering Conference

dbt Labs is hosting Coalesce 2022 from October 17-21, the annual conference dedicated to advancing the practice of analytics engineering. Formats include Coalesce Online (free), Coalesce New Orleans (in-person, Hyatt Regency), and Coalesce Online+ satellite events in London and Sydney.

events.agenda: A 'dbt Labs on dbt' session giving a behind-the-scenes look at how dbt Labs' own marketing team uses dbt for clean, actionable reporting.
events.event_description: dbt Meetups are networking events for people to connect over their experiences with dbt and discuss topics related to the data industry, team dynamics, and best practices.
events.location: Capital Factory, 701 Brazos St, Austin, TX
events.raw_text:
Tue, Jan 23, 2024 · 6:00 PM to 8:00 PM CST

Capital Factory, 701 Brazos St, Austin, TX

Austin dbt Meetup

In the dbt Labs on dbt series, a behind-the-scenes look at how dbt Labs uses data. Danny Lambert, Director of Marketing Operations at dbt Labs, will share how he's partnered with marketing leaders and the data team to deliver clean, simple reporting. Jakki Jakaj, Associate Manager of Integrated Marketing at dbt Labs, will share how her team uses this data every day to optimize marketing campaigns.

Agenda:
6:35-6:55 Presentation
6:55-7:05 Q&A

talks.description: How dbt Labs' own marketing operations and integrated marketing teams use dbt-powered reporting to optimize campaigns and support decision-making from campaign managers up to the executive team.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: In this session, Danny Lambert, Director of Marketing Operations at dbt Labs, will share how he's partnered with both marketing leaders and the data team to deliver clean, simple reporting... Jakki Jakaj, Associate Manager of Integrated Marketing at dbt Labs, will share how her team uses this data every day to optimize marketing campaigns.
talks.speaker_title: Director of Marketing Operations & Associate Manager of Integrated Marketing, dbt Labs
talks.title: dbt Labs on dbt: Marketing analytics and reporting

Thu, Oct 3, 2024 · 5:30 PM to 8:30 PM CDT

dbt Labs office - Austin

'dbt Labs on dbt' Meetup: Austin

Brandon Thomson, GTM Analytics Manager at dbt Labs, will share how he's partnered with both marketing leaders and the data team to deliver clean, simple reporting. Jakki Jakaj, Sr. Manager of Campaigns at dbt Labs, will share how her team uses this data every day to optimize marketing campaigns.

Comment from host: We want to reschedule when we can get a larger group together!

events.agenda: Talk on how dbt Cloud's metadata features (column-level lineage, model query history, advanced CI, Copilot, visual editor) help teams work smarter.
events.event_description: dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data, with talks predominantly focused on community members' experience with dbt.
events.location: dbt Labs, 522 Congress Avenue, Suite 700, Austin, TX
events.raw_text:
Wed, Jan 22, 2025 · 5:30 PM to 8:00 PM CST

dbt Labs, 522 Congress Avenue, Suite 700, Austin, TX

Austin dbt Meetup

Presentation by Nicole Smith (dbt Labs) on Unlocking the Power of Metadata: How dbt Cloud Helps Teams Work Smarter. Nicole highlighted existing and new features of dbt that help teams work smarter, such as column level lineage, model query history, advanced CI, Copilot and the visual editor.

Agenda:
6:05-6:35 Presentation
6:35-6:45 Q&A

talks.description: Overview of dbt Cloud features that leverage metadata to help teams work more efficiently, including column-level lineage, model query history, advanced CI, Copilot, and the visual editor.

talks.title: Unlocking the Power of Metadata: How dbt Cloud Helps Teams Work Smarter

events.location: dbt Labs, 522 Congress Avenue, Suite 700, Austin, TX
events.raw_text:
Thu, Apr 17, 2025 · 5:30 PM to 8:30 PM CDT

dbt Labs, 522 Congress Avenue, Suite 700, Austin, TX

Austin dbt Meetup: The 2025 State of the AE Report

Discussion of the State of the Analytics Engineering Report results with Amada Echeverria (Community @ dbt Labs), Sunny Pachunuri (Director of Data @ Outpost), Erica Louie (Senior Analytics Manager: Engineering, Product, Design @ dbt Labs), and Nikita Pestrov (Senior Analytics Engineer @ Zello).

Agenda:
6:00-6:50 Panel discussion
6:50-7:05 Q&A
